name: skilllink
description: A comprehensive learning platform that connects learners with mentors through chat, topic rooms, live classes, and tutorials.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:web
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && supabase start && supabase db reset
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:web && npm run deploy:mobile
scripts.deploy:web: cd web && npm run build && vercel --prod
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:mobile

author: SkillLink Team
